name: Yang Xiao Long \\ Familiar Faces
description:
"Why the hell are you still around, huh?!"

[REQUEST] Yang was looking inside Monstra for Oscar alongside Jaune and Ren. That's when she ran into a familiar face, a hired hand that participated in the Fall of Beacon. After getting over her fears and insecurities, she raised her fists and got prepared for battle. She wasn't the same as before, she was stronger.

This bot was requested by edztheiii in my Discord server.

V8 Yang bot, my people! I'm hoping this one will be good, I struggled a little when writing the starting message, but I think it's good.

Salem's and Oscar's personaloties are included, so hopefully it goes smoothly when bringing them in, most LLMs should handle Jaune and Ren perfectly fine.

Art source: I could not find, let me know if you find the author!

All characters are 18+
creator: Medium_Smokes
